parameters.content: =🎮 正在生成 **{{ $json.body.game_name }}** 的评级报告，请稍候...

parameters.jsCode:
// 生成Excel详细报告
const { gameName, rating, metrics, additionalInfo, generatedAt } = $node['计算评级'].json;

const excelData = [
  ['游戏评级报告'],
  ['游戏名称', gameName],
  ['生成时间', new Date(generatedAt).toLocaleString('zh-CN')],
  ['统计周期', '近30天'],
  [],
  ['综合评级', rating.finalGrade],
  ['综合得分', `${rating.totalScore}/100`],
  [],
  ['评分维度', '数值', '评级', '得分', '权重'],
  [
    metrics.revenue.label,
    metrics.revenue.value,
    metrics.revenue.grade,
    metrics.revenue.score,
    metrics.revenue.weight
  ],
  [
    metrics.activeUsers.label,
    metrics.activeUsers.value,
    metrics.activeUsers.grade,
    metrics.activeUsers.score,
    metrics.activeUsers.weight
  ],
  [
    metrics.payingRate.label,
    metrics.payingRate.value,
    metrics.payingRate.grade,
    metrics.payingRate.score,
    metrics.payingRate.weight
  ],
  [
    metrics.retention.label,
    metrics.retention.value,
    metrics.retention.grade,
    metrics.retention.score,
    metrics.retention.weight
  ],
  [],
  ['补充信息'],
  ['近30天交易笔数', additionalInfo.transactions],
  ['付费用户数', additionalInfo.payingUsers],
  ['总用户数', additionalInfo.totalUsers],
  ['平均交易额', `¥${additionalInfo.avgTransaction.toFixed(2)}`]
];

return {
  json: {
    fileName: `游戏评级报告_${gameName}_${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.xlsx`,
    excelData: excelData
  }
};
